lessons.title: Introduction & Overview
lessons.content: {"simpleExplanation":"Email automation and drip campaigns are essential strategies in modern digital marketing, designed to send timely, relevant messages to subscribers without manual effort. These tools allow businesses to nurture leads, onboard customers, and maintain engagement by delivering the right content at the right moment. What is Email Automation? Email automation refers to the process of using software to send emails based on specific triggers or actions taken by users.","whyItMatters":["Provides a robust foundation for advanced topics.","Improves system design and code maintainability.","Frequently asked in technical interviews."],"example":"// Example Concept: Introduction & Overview\n// Apply these principles in your projects to ensure robust functionality.","summary":"These actions could include signing up for a newsletter, abandoning a shopping cart, making a purchase, or clicking on a specific link. Automation ensures consistent communication, improves response time, and reduces manual workload.","practiceTask":"Review Introduction & Overview and identify 3 real-world applications where this principle is used."}

lessons.title: For example, when a user subscribes to your newsletter, an automated system can
